findings.issue: Foundation Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is missing in 4/5 products. Only MindShift implements it. Daemon upgrade does nothing to enforce cross-product compliance. Law 2 violation = unconstitutional drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Add Constitution guardrail check to daemon self-check loop. Block any ecosystem change that degrades Law 2 coverage. Require proof of implementation in all 5 products.

findings.issue: Self-check loop creates tasks but no validation against current code-index freshness. Risk of stale index triggering stale fixes. Code-index rebuilt every 6h but not verified against git HEAD.
findings.recommended_fix: On each self-check, compare index timestamp with latest git commit. If >15min lag, trigger rebuild before creating any task.

findings.issue: rebuild_code_index is flagged 'safe' but runs expensive disk+CPU operations. Under concurrent load, could starve other processes. Blast radius unbounded.
findings.recommended_fix: Cap rebuild concurrency to 1, add resource limits, and expose /healthz-index-build endpoint for external monitoring.
